existing=this._sessions.get(this.getRoomId(id));return existing||null;}createSession(roomId){let password=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:null;const session=new RoomSession();session.roomId=roomId;session.password=password;return this.addSession(session);}addSession(roomSession){if(!this._roomEngine.ready){this._pendingSession=roomSession;return false;}this._sessionStarting=true;const RoomSessionEvent(RoomSessionEvent.ENDED,session,openLandingView));session.dispose();}sessionUpdate(id,type){const session=this.getSession(id);if(!session)return;switch(type){case RoomSessionHandler.RS_CONNECTED:return;case RoomSessionHandler.RS_READY:// One-time "hard" warm render for FIRST room only, without forwarding/reloading.
if(!this._didInitialHardLoad){this._didInitialHardLoad=true;this.performInitialHardLoad(session.roomId);}return;case RoomSessionHandler.RS_DISCONNECTED:this.removeSession(id);return;}}sessionReinitialize(fromRoomId,toRoomId){const existing=this.getSession(fromRoomId);if(!existing)return;this._sessions.delete(this.getRoomId(fromRoomId));existing.reset(toRoomId);this._sessions.set(this.getRoomId(toRoomId),existing);this.setHandlers(existing);}/**
* Fixes "black screen on first login" by waiting until the room canvas exists,

*/performInitialHardLoad(roomId){this._roomEngine.disableUpdate(false);this._roomEngine.setActiveRoomId(roomId);// Wait for the rendering canvas to actually exist before ticking.

return id.toString();}get communication(){return this._communication;}get roomEngine(){return this._roomEngine;}get viewerSession(){return this._viewerSession;}}
